_note: M5-F5 defensive per-panel a11y coverage fragment (create-or-append). The M5-F6 a11y harness reconciles these via the append-only coverage.manifest.jsonl (which carries the matching builtin.playbar line + the registry.cpp registration); this per-panel file documents the panel's own gui-playbar-test_a11y coverage.

a11y_scan.assertion: uitree::audit_a11y() returns zero violations for the playbar across edit / playing / paused states, after an error, and with a populated observed play frame (the L-51 loud play-mode indicator surfaces as labelled status text, never an unlabelled node)

keyboard_nav.assertion: uitree::focus_order() reaches all four transport controls and the play.play / play.pause / play.stop / play.step commands each have a keyboard path (complete keyboard-only navigation)
